name: slow
description: A long-running approval — the task is in working before input_required.

input.title: Approve a full database export?
input.description: Exports every table in the production database to a signed S3 bucket. The export typically takes 4–6 minutes; the task will pause here for your approval before starting.

output_override.title: Approve a full database export?
output_override.description: Exports every table in the production database to a signed S3 bucket. The export typically takes 4–6 minutes; the task will pause here for your approval before starting.
